metadata.name: Handle Field Audit of a Business

description: An IRS agent is conducting a field audit at a client's place of business. The tax professional is representing the client.

nodes.task_description: Act as the primary point of contact for the IRS agent.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent manages all communication with the auditor.

nodes.task_description: Respond to Information Document Requests (IDRs) from the auditor in a timely manner.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides the requested documentation promptly and accurately.

nodes.task_description: Negotiate with the auditor on any proposed adjustments to the tax return.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent advocates for the client's position to minimize any additional tax.
